meta.title: [ES] MyWorkMate — AI-Powered Business Automation
meta.description: [ES] Connect intelligent AI agents to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, OneDrive, and SharePoint. Automate operations, gain insights, and transform how your team works.
meta.ogTitle: [ES] MyWorkMate — Your AI Business Command Center
meta.ogDescription: [ES] Multi-agent AI platform that connects to your Microsoft ecosystem. Automate ERP queries, analyze documents, visualize data — all through natural conversation.
meta.keywords: [ES] AI business assistant, Business Central AI, Dynamics 365 automation, Microsoft AI agent, ERP automation, knowledge base AI, multi-agent orchestration

hero.title: [ES] Your Business Runs on Data. Let AI Run With It.
hero.subtitle: [ES] MyWorkMate connects intelligent agents to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, OneDrive, and SharePoint — turning natural conversations into real business actions.

features.title: [ES] Everything Your Business Needs, One Conversation Away
features.subtitle: [ES] From ERP queries to document analysis, data visualization to web research — MyWorkMate brings the power of specialized AI agents to your daily operations.

erp.title: [ES] ERP Intelligence
erp.description: [ES] Query customers, vendors, invoices, sales orders, and inventory directly from Business Central. Create and modify records through natural language.

knowledge.title: [ES] Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: [ES] Upload documents and let AI understand them. Semantic search finds answers across your entire document library — PDFs, spreadsheets, presentations.

orchestration.title: [ES] Smart Orchestration
orchestration.description: [ES] Ask anything. The Orchestrator automatically routes your question to the right specialist agent, combining their capabilities when needed.

visualization.title: [ES] Data Visualization
visualization.description: [ES] Transform raw data into clear insights. Bar charts, line graphs, KPI dashboards, combo charts — generated from your data in seconds.

research.title: [ES] Research & Analysis
research.description: [ES] Real-time web search, data analysis with Python execution, and document generation. Your personal research assistant for complex questions.

files.title: [ES] Cloud File Sync
files.description: [ES] Connect OneDrive and SharePoint libraries. Your cloud documents become instantly searchable and available to AI agents.

agents.title: [ES] Specialized Agents That Work Together
agents.subtitle: [ES] Each agent is an expert in its domain. The Orchestrator coordinates them seamlessly, so you just ask — and the right expert answers.

supervisor.name: [ES] Orchestrator
supervisor.description: [ES] Analyzes your question and automatically selects the best specialist. Combines multiple agents when complex tasks require it.

bcAgent.name: [ES] Business Central Expert
bcAgent.description: [ES] Direct access to Dynamics 365 Business Central. Query financial data, manage inventory, process sales orders — all through conversation.

ragAgent.name: [ES] Knowledge Base Expert
ragAgent.description: [ES] Searches your uploaded documents using semantic understanding. Finds precise answers across thousands of pages instantly.

graphingAgent.name: [ES] Data Visualization Expert
graphingAgent.description: [ES] Transforms numbers into visual stories. From simple bar charts to complex KPI dashboards — all generated from your data.

researchAgent.name: [ES] Research & Analysis
researchAgent.description: [ES] Searches the web, analyzes data with Python, and generates comprehensive reports. Your research team, available 24/7.

roadmap.title: [ES] We're Just Getting Started
roadmap.subtitle: [ES] MyWorkMate is evolving fast. Here's what's live today and what's on the horizon.

multiAgent.title: [ES] Multi-Agent Orchestration
multiAgent.description: [ES] Supervisor routes to 5 specialized agents automatically

bcIntegration.title: [ES] Business Central Integration
bcIntegration.description: [ES] Full read & write access to Dynamics 365 Business Central

knowledgeBase.title: [ES] Knowledge Base (RAG)
knowledgeBase.description: [ES] Upload, search, and analyze documents with AI

dataViz.title: [ES] Data Visualization
dataViz.description: [ES] 10 chart types generated from structured data

cloudSync.title: [ES] OneDrive & SharePoint Sync
cloudSync.description: [ES] Connect cloud libraries for seamless document access

webResearch.title: [ES] Web Research & Code Execution
webResearch.description: [ES] Real-time web search and Python sandbox

mobileApp.title: [ES] Mobile Application
mobileApp.description: [ES] Full MyWorkMate experience on your phone

parallelAgents.title: [ES] Parallel Agent Execution
parallelAgents.description: [ES] Multiple agents working simultaneously on complex tasks

workflows.title: [ES] Automated Workflows
workflows.description: [ES] Create repeatable tasks triggered by events or commands

customAgents.title: [ES] Custom Agent Builder
customAgents.description: [ES] Create your own agents with custom skills and MCP tools

environments.title: [ES] Organization Environments
environments.description: [ES] Team management, billing controls, and usage tracking

deepResearch.title: [ES] Deep Research Mode
deepResearch.description: [ES] Autonomous multi-step research with source synthesis

waitlist.title: [ES] Be First to Experience the Future of Business AI
waitlist.subtitle: [ES] Join the waitlist for priority access. We'll notify you as new features launch and you'll get exclusive early-bird pricing.

success.title: [ES] You're on the list!
success.message: [ES] We'll reach out soon with updates and early access details.

error.title: [ES] Something went wrong
error.message: [ES] Please try again later. We're working on it.
error.unimplemented: [ES] Waitlist service is being set up. Check back soon!

benefits.feedback: [ES] Shape the product with your feedback

pricing.title: [ES] Plans That Scale With Your Business
pricing.subtitle: [ES] Start free. Upgrade when you need more power.

starter.name: [ES] Starter
starter.description: [ES] For regular users and small teams

professional.name: [ES] Professional
professional.description: [ES] For power users and growing businesses

trial.question: [ES] Is there a free trial for paid plans?
trial.answer: [ES] Yes, all paid plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

cancel.question: [ES] Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: [ES] Absolutely. Cancel anytime with no fees. Your data remains accessible for 30 days after cancellation.

enterprise.question: [ES] Do you offer enterprise plans?
enterprise.answer: [ES] Yes. Contact us for custom pricing, dedicated support, and on-premise deployment options.

security.title: [ES] Built for Businesses That Take Security Seriously
security.subtitle: [ES] Your data stays yours. Every interaction is secured, every action is auditable, every access is controlled.

encryption.title: [ES] Encrypted at Rest & Transit
encryption.description: [ES] AES-256-GCM encryption for stored tokens. TLS for all communications.

tenantIsolation.title: [ES] Tenant Isolation
tenantIsolation.description: [ES] Strict data separation. Your documents, sessions, and AI interactions are invisible to other users.

permissions.title: [ES] Granular Permissions
permissions.description: [ES] Control what agents can do. Some actions always require your approval — you decide which.

gdpr.title: [ES] GDPR Compliant
gdpr.description: [ES] Full data portability and right to deletion. Cascade delete removes all PII on request.

audit.title: [ES] Full Audit Trail
audit.description: [ES] Every agent action, every tool call, every decision — logged and traceable.

oauth.title: [ES] Microsoft SSO
oauth.description: [ES] Sign in with your existing Microsoft account. No new passwords to manage.

footer.tagline: Automatización empresarial impulsada por IA para el ecosistema Microsoft.

privacy.title: [ES] Privacy Policy
privacy.placeholder: [ES] Our privacy policy is being prepared. Check back soon.

terms.title: [ES] Terms of Service
terms.placeholder: [ES] Our terms of service are being prepared. Check back soon.
